ground_truth.title: Streaming and Entertainment News from Industry Experts
ground_truth.main_content:
Streaming and Entertainment News from Industry Experts
Our experts dig into the latest trends and important news in streaming and entertainment to help you live your best TV life.
Our latest industry news articles
Streaming and TV move a mile a minute. Let the experts at CableTV.com help you tune in to what to expect when services change and your favorite shows and movies move (or disappear altogether).
Cable TV Customer? “Channel Bloat” May Be Costing You Over $1,600 a Year
By Logan Jones
Dec 17, 2025
Drawing on data from vetted external studies and a survey we conducted with nearly 27,000 real TV customers, we've determined how much Americans are wasting on their cable plans each year.
Announcing the 2026 CableTV.com Customer Satisfaction Award Winners
By Mike Strayer
Dec 16, 2025
Get insights from our customer satisfaction surveys for TV and internet. See which providers ranked highest in terms of customer satisfaction.

Stop overpaying! CableTV.com’s deals expert finds the week's deepest internet, TV, & mobile deals and discounts. Get exclusive, updated savings you won't find anywhere else.

By Alex Vejar
Dec 5, 2025
The MLB viewing landscape changed big time with news that the league made a deal with ESPN, Netflix, and NBC. We broke down the MLB.TV aspect of the deal.
Netflix Buying Warner Bros. Could Lead to Worse Content at Higher Prices
By Mike Strayer
Dec 5, 2025
Netflix has bid $72B to buy Warner Bros. We analyze what this mega-merger means for your wallet, HBO Max, and the future of streaming content.

Fubo Blackout Explained: NBC, USA Network, and RSNs Go Dark in Contract Dispute
By Alex Vejar
Nov 25, 2025
Fubo has dropped at least 40 NBCUniversal channels due to a carriage dispute. We talked to both companies to understand the issues at play and what comes next.
CableTV.com’s Internet, TV, and Mobile Deals of the Week (November 24–November 30): Black Friday Has Arrived! Get Free TVs, Gift Cards, Internet Service, and More

By Taylor Kujawa
Nov 17, 2025
The new NBC Sports Network (NBCSN) has arrived. Confused? We take a quick look at the channel's return, what coverage it includes, and how to get it on TV.

Our industry reports and surveys
Our expert staff regularly conducts surveys and creates reports that give our readers a better understanding of the TV and internet services available to them. Check out what the hard data says so you get the right service for you.
2026 On-Demand Streaming Customer Satisfaction Awards: Crunchyroll, Disney Bundle Find Unexpected Success
By Olivia Bono
Dec 16, 2025
The results are in! Our exclusive 2026 survey reveals the best on-demand streaming TV providers ranked by real customer satisfaction data. See the current industry leaders now.
2026 Live TV Streaming Customer Satisfaction Survey: TV Superfans Are Happier Paying Premium Prices
By Taylor Kujawa
Dec 16, 2025
We surveyed 8,000+ customers to find the best live TV streaming services of 2026. See what topped the list and why the results differ a lot from previous years.
2026 TV Customer Satisfaction Awards: Spectrum Streaming Unseats Fios, Cable Providers Hold Strong
By Logan Jones
Dec 16, 2025
We asked nearly 5,000 TV customers to rate their TV providers across categories such as cost, reliability, channel count, and more. See how top providers like Spectrum, Xfinity, Verizon, and more rank in customer satisfaction.
Internet Customer Satisfaction Survey 2026: Fiber, 5G ISPs Still On The Rise
By Eric Chiu
Dec 16, 2025
Find out what customers like you think of top internet service providers across the U.S. See how real customers feel about speed, billing, and more.
Why More Gen Z, Millennials Are Bundling Cell Phone and Internet Service
By Eric Chiu
Jun 1, 2025
Gen-Z and millennial shoppers are nearly two times more likely to bundle cell phone and internet service compared to older shoppers. We talked to shoppers to understand why they’re bundling up.
51% of Americans still have cable TV, here’s why
By Logan Jones
Mar 28, 2025
With all of the streaming services out there, why are people still paying for cable TV? Live sports and comfort are the big reasons.
Is Home Internet Getting More Expensive? Here’s What We Found Out in 2025.
By Eric Chiu
Feb 4, 2025
Is home internet getting more expensive? CableTV.com investigated and this is what we found out.

How Many Americans Have Forgotten to Cancel a Streaming Free Trial? New Study Shocks the Experts.
By Olivia Bono
Oct 10, 2025
Most people have signed up for a streaming service’s free trial, and a lot of people intend to cancel once the promo period is over. But not everyone remembers to do so.
Spectrum Customers, You Can Cancel Your Disney+ Subscription Now
By Olivia Bono
Oct 6, 2025
If you’re a Spectrum TV customer, you may be over-paying for your streaming services. So dig up your password book and get cancellin’.
Is Late Night Dying? Fans Rally Behind Jimmy Kimmel and Stephen Colbert in New Survey
By Olivia Bono
Sep 26, 2025
Kimmel is now back on the air, but only in certain cities. This comes just a couple of months after CBS cancelled The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, and After Midnight before that. Is this the beginning of the end for late-night TV? We asked 500 Americans what they thought, and their answers surprised us.
NBA League Pass Is Moving to Amazon Prime Video: What This Means for You
By Alex Vejar
Nov 24, 2025
NBA League Pass is moving to Amazon Prime Video. Our writer reached out to several services to find out if they’d be impacted by the change. Here’s what he found.
Coffee and Controversy: Gilmore Girls 25th Anniversary Sees Boyfriend Debate Reignite and a Chance to Win $250
By Mike Strayer
Sep 26, 2025
Celebrate the Gilmore Girls 25th Anniversary with CableTV.com! Discover new fan stats, test your knowledge, and follow us on Insta to win $250 in prizes.
YouTube and Netflix Are Preserving the Future of Sesame Street. Who Would Have Thought It?
By Olivia Bono
Sep 25, 2025
Today I get the rare treat of telling you something these corporations did right. That’s right—Netflix and YouTube have both signed deals with Sesame Workshop that’ll actually improve things for kids and families. It’s a bit of a long story, so let’s jump right into the details.
Dollar Horror! CableTV.com Partners with Screambox for $0.99 Promo Code and $666.00 Halloween “Thrillternship”
By Randy Harward
Sep 22, 2025
As part of our annual Bloodstream campaign, CableTV.com and premium horror streaming service Screambox are hiring a “thrilltern.” One lucky person will receive a one-time paycheck totalling a diabolical $666.00, a $50.00 Uber Eats code, and a free year of Screambox.
Incoming! Buzzy Horror Flick Weapons Is Finally Streaming—Here’s How to Watch It
By Randy Harward
Sep 12, 2025
OMG! Have you seen Weapons yet? I’ve seen it twice now. If you haven’t been able to catch Zach Cregger’s chilling, gripping Barbarian follow-up in theaters, you’re in luck. Weapons—the third-highest-rated horror movie of 2025 according to Rotten Tomatoes—is finally on VOD, and we’ll tell you where to rent or buy it.
YouTube Officially Rolls Out AI Age Verification, What You Need to Know
By Olivia Bono
Sep 8, 2025
YouTube’s AI allegedly works by tracking a “variety of signals” like “the types of videos a user is searching for, the categories of videos they have watched, or the longevity of the account.” You need to be 13 to make a Google account, so hypothetically speaking, accounts older than five years should be good to go. Unfortunately, there’s a big gray area there. “Hypothetically speaking” isn’t the same thing as 100% confidence.
Unsubscribed: New Data Reveals Why Viewers Are Saying Goodbye to Netflix (and Other Streamers)
By Olivia Bono
Sep 8, 2025
Streaming is the biggest thing in TV right now, and the landscape of the industry is constantly changing. The vast majority of people are subscribed to at least one streaming service. So what would drive someone to cancel their subscription?
Belichick or Bust? Fans vs. Analysts on Which New College Football Coaches Will Thrive
By Eric Chiu
Aug 15, 2025
Which new college football coaches will survive, thrive, or falter this season? We talked to the fans to find out more.
ESPN, FOX Launch Streaming Bundle: Why It Matters for Football, Sports Fans
By Eric Chiu
Aug 15, 2025
ESPN, FOX Launch Streaming Bundle: Why It Matters for Football, Sports Fans
